programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Ex-demolition man Phil Routledge hopes to blow his guests away at the ultra-modern The Arches on the Isle of Man. But some of his high-tech gadgets leave them confused.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Can Robbie and John's traditional Blackpool B&B, The Trafford, impress their well-heeled rivals? The hosts try to sweeten the deal with a lesson in how to make Blackpool rock.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Empty-nester Julie Brogan welcomes her rivals to the grand Sheepy Lodge in Warwickshire, where she faces her worst fear: cooking poached eggs for her guests.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: It's the final day of the competition, and the rival B&Bers meet to settle some scores and to find out how much they've been paid - and who's won the week.

programs.title: Location, Location, Location
programs.desc: We catch up with Kirsten and Scott in Fife, who've had multiple job and location moves across nine years. Have they finally put down roots? And did Digi find her passion project.

programs.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programs.desc: In Albrighton, Jamie Lea and Curtis have reached a stalemate. Jamie Lea wants to settle down in their three-bed terrace, but Curtis is keen to find another project.
